column1: Luis Arraez stands out as the top pick, offering elite reliability near the top of the order with a strong track record of hitting safely in nearly three-quarters of his games. He benefits from a favorable park boost and a clear platoon edge against Michael Lorenzen. Rafael Devers also brings a platoon advantage and recent momentum, making him a solid secondary option. Ernie Clement and Matt Olson round out the list with steady profiles, but Arraez’s consistency sets him apart today.
